calendar.matters:
Motion To Compel Bank Of America To Honor Notice Of Levy & Sanctions Under Ccp ? 701.020
Off Calendar Aug-26-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Brandon J. Witkow, of Witkow Law, Tel. 818.296.9508, for plaintiffs;
Clara Morain Nabity, of Orrick, Herrington & Sutcliffe LLP, Tel. 415.773.5541, for third-party, Bank of America.

Ruling: A R G U E D. PLAINTIFF RIDGE APTS. HOLDING COMPANY, LLC Motion To Compel Bank Of America To Honor Notice Of Levy & Sanctions Under CCP 701.020 is taken under submission. The parties shall email their proposed orders to the Judge Pro Tem by Aug-10-16. Judge Pro Tem: David Mangini; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
